title: Moderation Queue Update - April 19
body:
## Abuse Queue Triage Complete

**Actions Taken:**
- Banned:  (phishing spam in 6 channels)
- Banned:  (targeted harassment of newcomers)
- Warned:  (off-topic posting)
- Warned:  (suspicious automation)

**Dismissed:**
- 2 reports against trusted members (, ) were identified as false positives/disputes and closed without sanction.

**Summary:** 2 bans, 2 warnings, 2 dismissals. Queue cleared.
